mapper.select:
SELECT pbhe.fid, pbhe.f_sfbg, pbhe.f_jqhx, pbhe.f_cplb, pbhe.f_bzbz, pbhe.f_khhh, pbhe.f_cpdm, pbhe.f_ora_baseproperty, pbhe.f_ora_baseproperty1, bm.name AS f_gyswlbm_name, pbhe.f_gyswlmc, pbhe.fqty, pbhe.f_cpsl, bd.name AS funit_name, bld.name AS fpriceunit_name,
pbhe.fstockunitid, pbhe.fstockqty, pbhe.fbaseunitid,
pbhe.fdeliverydate, pbhe.f_ckj, pbhe.f_cbj, pbhe.ftaxprice,
pbhe.f_jjhsdj, pbhe.f_jjjshj, pbhe.f_kphsdj, pbhe.fentrydiscountrate, pbhe.fentrytaxrate, pbhe.fentrytaxamount, pbhe.fallamount, pbhe.fentryamount,
pbhe.fsalqty, pbhe.fstockbasefinapqty, pbhe.f_ora_decimal,
pbhe.fsumaccallamount, pbhe.fsumaccrate, pbhe.f_xss, pbhe.f_tp, pbhe.f_tp2, pbhe.f_bgzwpm, pbhe.f_bgywpm, pbhe.f_yhs, pbhe.fbillstatus, pbhe.f_zxs, pbhe.f_mzz, pbhe.f_xs,
pbhe.f_bcfysl, pbhe.fbillstatus1, pbhe.f_xtslddsl, pbhe.fbillstatus3, pbhe.f_yhbl, pbhe.f_bzfs, pbhe.f_khjc1, pbhe.f_kh1, pbhe.f_smsfj, pbhe.f_cpgys, pbhe.f_bcjsd, pbhe.f_bcjsr, pbhe.f_bcjsrdh, pbhe.f_bgdw, pbhe.f_sbys, pbhe.f_cys, pbhe.f_kddh, pbhe.f_jcrq, pbhe.f_jgtzyy, pbhe.f_cpzlyq, pbhe.fbzyq, pbhe.ftsyq, pbhe.fcptp,
pbhe.fbzgctg, pbhe.fgchh,
pbhe.fxsddh, pbhe.fxsddhh,
pbhe.fshrq, pbhe.fxddrkts,
pbhe.fbjr, pbhe.ftpr, pbhe.f_tm, pbhe.f_cplb1,
pbhe.fentrynote, pbhe.create_time, pbhe.update_time
FROM po_order_bill_head_entry pbhe LEFT JOIN by_material bm ON bm.k3_id = pbhe.f_gyswlbm LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bd ON bd.kingdee = pbhe.funitid
LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bld ON bld.kingdee = pbhe.fpriceunitid
WHERE pbhe.fbillNo = #{fbillNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE po_order_bill_head_entry SET f_sfbg = #{entity.fSfbg}, f_jqhx = #{entity.fJqhx}, f_cplb = #{entity.fCplb}, f_bzbz = #{entity.fBzbz}, f_khhh = #{entity.fKhhh}, f_cpdm = #{entity.fCpdm}, f_ora_baseproperty = #{entity.fOraBaseproperty}, f_ora_baseproperty1 = #{entity.fOraBaseproperty1}, f_gyswlbm = #{entity.fGyswlbm}, f_gyswlmc = #{entity.fGyswlmc}, fqty = #{entity.fqty}, f_cpsl = #{entity.fCpsl}, funitid = #{entity.funitid}, fpriceunitid = #{entity.fpriceunitid}, fstockunitid = #{entity.fstockunitid}, fstockqty = #{entity.fstockqty}, fbaseunitid = #{entity.fbaseunitid}, fdeliverydate = #{entity.fdeliverydate}, f_ckj = #{entity.fCkj}, f_cbj = #{entity.fCbj}, fprice = #{entity.fprice}, ftaxprice = #{entity.ftaxprice}, f_jjhsdj = #{entity.fJjhsdj}, f_jjjshj = #{entity.fJjjshj}, f_kphsdj = #{entity.fKphsdj}, fentrydiscountrate = #{entity.fentrydiscountrate}, fentrytaxrate = #{entity.fentrytaxrate}, fentrytaxamount = #{entity.fentrytaxamount}, fallamount = #{entity.fallamount}, fentryamount = #{entity.fentryamount}, fsalqty = #{entity.fsalqty}, fstockbasefinapqty = #{entity.fstockbasefinapqty}, f_ora_decimal = #{entity.fOraDecimal}, fsumaccallamount = #{entity.fsumaccallamount}, fsumaccrate = #{entity.fsumaccrate}, f_xss = #{entity.fXss}, f_tp = #{entity.fTp}, f_tp2 = #{entity.fTp2}, f_bgzwpm = #{entity.fBgzwpm}, f_bgywpm = #{entity.fBgywpm}, f_yhs = #{entity.fYhs}, fbillstatus = #{entity.fbillstatus}, f_zxs = #{entity.fZxs}, f_mzz = #{entity.fMzz}, f_xs = #{entity.fXs}, f_bcfysl = #{entity.fBcfysl}, fbillstatus1 = #{entity.fbillstatus1}, f_xtslddsl = #{entity.fXtslddsl}, fbillstatus3 = #{entity.fbillstatus3}, f_yhbl = #{entity.fYhbl}, f_bzfs = #{entity.fBzfs}, f_khjc1 = #{entity.fKhjc1}, f_kh1 = #{entity.fKh1}, f_smsfj = #{entity.fSmsfj}, f_cpgys = #{entity.fCpgys}, f_bcjsd = #{entity.fBcjsd}, f_bcjsr = #{entity.fBcjsr}, f_bcjsrdh = #{entity.fBcjsrdh}, f_bgdw = #{entity.fBgdw}, f_sbys = #{entity.fSbys}, f_cys = #{entity.fCys}, f_kddh = #{entity.fKddh}, f_jcrq = #{entity.fJcrq}, f_jgtzyy = #{entity.fJgtzyy}, f_cpzlyq = #{entity.fCpzlyq}, fbzyq = #{entity.fbzyq}, ftsyq = #{entity.ftsyq}, fcptp = #{entity.fcptp}, fbzgctg = #{entity.fbzgctg}, fgchh = #{entity.fgchh}, fxsddh = #{entity.fxsddh}, fxsddhh = #{entity.fxsddhh}, fshrq = #{entity.fshrq}, fxddrkts = #{entity.fxddrkts}, fbjr = #{entity.fbjr}, ftpr = #{entity.ftpr}, f_tm = #{entity.fTm}, f_cplb1 = #{entity.fCplb1}, fentrynote = #{entity.fentrynote}, update_time = #{entity.updateTime} WHERE fid = #{entity.fid}

UPDATE po_order_bill_head_entry SET f_sfbg = #{entity.fSfbg}, f_jqhx = #{entity.fJqhx}, fbillNo = #{entity.fbillNo}, f_cplb = #{entity.fCplb}, f_bzbz = #{entity.fBzbz}, f_khhh = #{entity.fKhhh}, f_cpdm = #{entity.fCpdm}, f_ora_baseproperty = #{entity.fOraBaseproperty}, f_ora_baseproperty1 = #{entity.fOraBaseproperty1}, f_gyswlbm = #{entity.fGyswlbm}, f_gyswlmc = #{entity.fGyswlmc}, fqty = #{entity.fqty}, f_cpsl = #{entity.fCpsl}, funitid = #{entity.funitid}, fpriceunitid = #{entity.fpriceunitid}, fstockunitid = #{entity.fstockunitid}, fstockqty = #{entity.fstockqty}, fbaseunitid = #{entity.fbaseunitid}, fdeliverydate = #{entity.fdeliverydate}, f_ckj = #{entity.fCkj}, f_cbj = #{entity.fCbj}, fprice = #{entity.fprice}, ftaxprice = #{entity.ftaxprice}, f_jjhsdj = #{entity.fJjhsdj}, f_jjjshj = #{entity.fJjjshj}, f_kphsdj = #{entity.fKphsdj}, fentrydiscountrate = #{entity.fentrydiscountrate}, fentrytaxrate = #{entity.fentrytaxrate}, fentrytaxamount = #{entity.fentrytaxamount}, fallamount = #{entity.fallamount}, fentryamount = #{entity.fentryamount}, fsalqty = #{entity.fsalqty}, fstockbasefinapqty = #{entity.fstockbasefinapqty}, f_ora_decimal = #{entity.fOraDecimal}, fsumaccallamount = #{entity.fsumaccallamount}, fsumaccrate = #{entity.fsumaccrate}, f_xss = #{entity.fXss}, f_tp = #{entity.fTp}, f_tp2 = #{entity.fTp2}, f_bgzwpm = #{entity.fBgzwpm}, f_bgywpm = #{entity.fBgywpm}, f_yhs = #{entity.fYhs}, fbillstatus = #{entity.fbillstatus}, f_zxs = #{entity.fZxs}, f_mzz = #{entity.fMzz}, f_xs = #{entity.fXs}, f_bcfysl = #{entity.fBcfysl}, fbillstatus1 = #{entity.fbillstatus1}, f_xtslddsl = #{entity.fXtslddsl}, fbillstatus3 = #{entity.fbillstatus3}, f_yhbl = #{entity.fYhbl}, f_bzfs = #{entity.fBzfs}, f_khjc1 = #{entity.fKhjc1}, f_kh1 = #{entity.fKh1}, f_smsfj = #{entity.fSmsfj}, f_cpgys = #{entity.fCpgys}, f_bcjsd = #{entity.fBcjsd}, f_bcjsr = #{entity.fBcjsr}, f_bcjsrdh = #{entity.fBcjsrdh}, f_bgdw = #{entity.fBgdw}, f_sbys = #{entity.fSbys}, f_cys = #{entity.fCys}, f_kddh = #{entity.fKddh}, f_jcrq = #{entity.fJcrq}, f_jgtzyy = #{entity.fJgtzyy}, f_cpzlyq = #{entity.fCpzlyq}, fbzyq = #{entity.fbzyq}, ftsyq = #{entity.ftsyq}, fcptp = #{entity.fcptp}, fbzgctg = #{entity.fbzgctg}, fgchh = #{entity.fgchh}, fxsddh = #{entity.fxsddh}, fxsddhh = #{entity.fxsddhh}, fshrq = #{entity.fshrq}, fxddrkts = #{entity.fxddrkts}, fbjr = #{entity.fbjr}, ftpr = #{entity.ftpr}, f_tm = #{entity.fTm}, f_cplb1 = #{entity.fCplb1}, fentrynote = #{entity.fentrynote}, update_time = #{entity.updateTime} WHERE fid = #{entity.fid} AND f_gyswlbm = #{entity.fGyswlbm}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO po_order_bill_head_entry ( fid,fbillNo, f_sfbg, f_jqhx, f_cplb, f_bzbz, f_khhh, f_cpdm, f_ora_baseproperty, f_ora_baseproperty1, f_gyswlbm, f_gyswlmc, fqty, f_cpsl, funitid, fpriceunitid, fstockunitid, fstockqty, fbaseunitid, fdeliverydate, f_ckj, f_cbj, fprice, ftaxprice, f_jjhsdj, f_jjjshj, f_kphsdj, fentrydiscountrate, fentrytaxrate, fentrytaxamount, fallamount, fentryamount, fsalqty, fstockbasefinapqty, f_ora_decimal, fsumaccallamount, fsumaccrate, f_xss, f_tp, f_tp2, f_bgzwpm, f_bgywpm, f_yhs, fbillstatus, f_zxs, f_mzz, f_xs, f_bcfysl, fbillstatus1, f_xtslddsl, fbillstatus3, f_yhbl, f_bzfs, f_khjc1, f_kh1, f_smsfj, f_cpgys, f_bcjsd, f_bcjsr, f_bcjsrdh, f_bgdw, f_sbys, f_cys, f_kddh, f_jcrq, f_jgtzyy, f_cpzlyq, fbzyq, ftsyq, fcptp, fbzgctg, fgchh, fxsddh, fxsddhh, fshrq, fxddrkts, fbjr, ftpr, f_tm, f_cplb1, fentrynote, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{fid}, #{fbillNo}, #{fSfbg}, #{fJqhx}, #{fCplb}, #{fBzbz}, #{fKhhh}, #{fCpdm}, #{fOraBaseproperty}, #{fOraBaseproperty1}, #{fGyswlbm}, #{fGyswlmc}, #{fqty}, #{fCpsl}, #{funitid}, #{fpriceunitid}, #{fstockunitid}, #{fstockqty}, #{fbaseunitid}, #{fdeliverydate}, #{fCkj}, #{fCbj}, #{fprice}, #{ftaxprice}, #{fJjhsdj}, #{fJjjshj}, #{fKphsdj}, #{fentrydiscountrate}, #{fentrytaxrate}, #{fentrytaxamount}, #{fallamount}, #{fentryamount}, #{fsalqty}, #{fstockbasefinapqty}, #{fOraDecimal}, #{fsumaccallamount}, #{fsumaccrate}, #{fXss}, #{fTp}, #{fTp2}, #{fBgzwpm}, #{fBgywpm}, #{fYhs}, #{fbillstatus}, #{fZxs}, #{fMzz}, #{fXs}, #{fBcfysl}, #{fbillstatus1}, #{fXtslddsl}, #{fbillstatus3}, #{fYhbl}, #{fBzfs}, #{fKhjc1}, #{fKh1}, #{fSmsfj}, #{fCpgys}, #{fBcjsd}, #{fBcjsr}, #{fBcjsrdh}, #{fBgdw}, #{fSbys}, #{fCys}, #{fKddh}, #{fJcrq}, #{fJgtzyy}, #{fCpzlyq}, #{fbzyq}, #{ftsyq}, #{fcptp}, #{fbzgctg}, #{fgchh}, #{fxsddh}, #{fxsddhh}, #{fshrq}, #{fxddrkts}, #{fbjr}, #{ftpr}, #{fTm}, #{fCplb1}, #{fentrynote}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
